threshold_count: 1 or more distressing or disruptive somatic symptoms plus 1 or more health-related thoughts/behaviors

symptoms.description: The patient experiences one or more distressing physical symptoms that significantly disrupt their daily life.
The patient invests excessive time and energy in health care or experiences persistent, high-level anxiety about the seriousness of their symptoms.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

diagnosis_name: Somatic Symptom Disorder, with Predominant Pain
threshold_count: 1 or more distressing somatic symptoms (primarily pain) plus 1 or more health-related thoughts/behaviors

symptoms.description: The patient experiences severe, often chronic physical pain as their predominant somatic complaint, which lacks an apparent physical cause or exceeds typical expectations.
The patient invests excessive time and energy in health care or experiences persistent, high-level anxiety about the seriousness of their symptoms.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: 1 or more symptoms of altered voluntary motor or sensory function
duration_rule: Not specified; can be acute (<6 months) or persistent (6+ months)

symptoms.description: The patient experiences altered voluntary motor or sensory functioning, such as weakness, paralysis, or abnormal movements.
The patient exhibits sensory or voluntary motor symptoms that are clinically inconsistent with any recognized medical or neurological condition.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Preoccupation with having/acquiring serious illness plus high health anxiety and excessive health-related behaviors

symptoms.description: The patient is preoccupied with fears of having or acquiring a serious, undiagnosed illness.
The patient has a high level of anxiety about health and is easily alarmed about their personal health status.
The patient performs excessive health-related behaviors, such as repeatedly checking their body for signs of illness, or exhibits maladaptive avoidance of medical care.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

diagnosis_name: Psychological Factors Affecting Other Medical Conditions
threshold_count: 1 or more psychological or behavioral factors that adversely affect a medical condition

symptoms.description: The patient exhibits a psychological or behavioral factor that adversely affects a medical condition, interferes with treatment, or constitutes an additional health risk.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Intentional falsification of physical or psychological signs/symptoms or induction of injury/disease

symptoms.description: The patient intentionally falsifies physical or psychological signs or symptoms, or induces injury or disease in themselves, to present as ill, impaired, or injured.
The patient exhibits deceptive behavior that is evident even in the absence of obvious external rewards, such as financial gain or avoiding legal responsibility.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Perpetrator intentionally falsifies or induces illness/injury in another person

symptoms.description: The patient intentionally falsifies physical or psychological signs or symptoms, or induces injury or disease in another person, presenting the victim as ill, impaired, or injured.
The patient exhibits deceptive behavior that is evident even in the absence of obvious external rewards, such as financial gain or avoiding legal responsibility.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

diagnosis_name: Other Specified Somatic Symptom and Related Disorder
threshold_count: Symptoms characteristic of somatic symptom disorder that cause distress but do not meet full criteria

symptoms.description: The patient experiences characteristic and distressing somatic symptoms that do not meet the full diagnostic threshold for a specific disorder.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

diagnosis_name: Unspecified Somatic Symptom and Related Disorder
threshold_count: Somatic symptoms present but insufficient information for a specific diagnosis

symptoms.description: The patient presents with somatic symptoms, but there is insufficient information to make a specific diagnosis.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.
